title: Bodebojo's Enchantments
description: A Datapack that adds random enchantments I feel would fit in the vanilla game
body:
[![Bodebojo's Enchantments Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22674e3ec5637a02f65163e225b557180fa41065.png)]()

Bodebojo's Enchantments introduces a variety of new enchantments that I believe would enhance the vanilla experience, adding good, very good, and cursed enchantments to the game. The enchantments are divided into two categories: Normal Enchantments and Cursed Enchantments.

---

## Normal Enchantments
- **Abyss**: Deal more damage in low light level environments. Can be applied to swords, axes, and maces. Mutually exclusive with Bane of Arthropods, Sharpness, and Smite. (**1 level**)
- **Autosmelt**: Automatically smelts mined blocks. Can be applied to all tools. (**1 level**)
- **Exploding**: Causes arrows to explode on impact. Can be applied to bows and crossbows. Mutually exclusive with Infinity. (**1 level**)
- **Fortress Stance**: Grants resistance and slowness when shifting. Can be applied to chestplates. (**1 level**)
- **Frost Hooves**: Temporarily freezes water around a horse. Can be applied to horse armor. (**2 levels**)
- **Miner's Grace**: Increases the chance of finding valuable items when mining below Y0. Can be applied to pickaxes. Mutually exclusive with Silk Touch and Fortune. (**5 levels**)
- **Nocturnal**: Increases damage dealt at night. Can be applied to swords, axes, and maces. Mutually exclusive with Bane of Arthropods, Sharpness, and Smite. (**5 levels**)
- **Owl Eyes**: Provides night vision when worn. Can be applied to helmets. (**1 level**)
- **Portal Pace**: Increases speed on end portal frames and obsidian. Can be applied to boots. (**3 levels**)
- **Step**: Allows stepping up full blocks. Can be applied to boots. (**1 level**)
- **Thundering**: Starts a thunderstorm when striking a lightning rod in rainy weather. Can be applied to tridents. Mutually exclusive with Channeling and Riptide. (**1 level**)
- **Withering**: Applies the wither effect to mobs when hit. Can be applied to swords, axes, and maces. (**3 levels**)

## Cursed Enchantments
- **4 Eyes**: Causes blindness when worn. Can be applied to helmets. (**1 level**)
- **Acrophobia**: Induces nausea when above Y190. Can be applied to armor. (**1 level**)
- **Rust**: Increases the deterioration rate of armor and tools. Can be applied to any item with durability. (**1 level**)
- **Speluncaphobia**: Induces nausea when below Y0. Can be applied to armor. (**1 level**)
- **Spontaneous Combustion**: Random chance of exploding when taking damage. Can be applied to armor. (**1 level**)

---
